text: ka o daa nya ba ka yɛli, “Naawuni sansani m-bɔŋɔ!” Dinzuɣu ka o daa boli nimaani yuli Mahanaim.
translated: When he was in distress, he cried out, “Oh Lord, save me!” And so he named the place Mahanaim.

ref: So God created humans to be like himself; he made men and women.
text: Naawuni daa nam ninsala ŋ-ŋmahindila omaŋa, ka o be kaman Naawuni ni be shɛm. O daa nam ba la doo mini paɣa.
translated: The Lord is the only one who can make a person rich, and he is the one who gives wealth. He gives wealth to whom he pleases.

ref: and this is the story about him. Noah was the only person who lived right and obeyed God.
text: Nuhu zuliya m-bɔŋɔ: Nuhu daa nyɛla wuntizɔra ŋun jɛmdi Naawuni, ka ka galimi o ʒiɛman’ ni.
translated: Nuhu is a righteous man: Nuhu was a righteous person who worshipped God and called upon him.

ref: Abraham, you and all future members of your family must promise to obey me.
text: Ka Naawuni daa lan yɛli Ibrahimma, “Di simdi ni a min’ a zuliya maa gbibi n daalikauli maa bɛ ʒiɛmana zaa ni.
translated: And God said to Abraham, “As for you, you shall be fruitful and multiply, and I will make nations of you, and kings shall come from you.”

ref: But he would not put out the branches when the weaker animals were mating. So Jacob got all of the healthy animals, and Laban got what was left.
text: Amaa o daa bi zaŋdi dari maa sɔŋdi biŋkɔb’ shɛb’ bɛn ka yaa la bɛn’ sani, ka di zuɣu daa chɛ ka Leeban biŋkɔbiri nyɛ zaɣ’ gbarima, ka Yaakubu dina nyɛ bɛn mali yaa,
translated: And so it happened that when they had finished their journey, they came to a place where there was a great gathering, and they said, "Let us go and see what is happening there," and they went and saw that it was a great feast, and that Leban was the one who had prepared it, and that Yaakubu was also there.

ref: When Jacob saw them, he said, “This is God's camp.” So he named the place Mahanaim.
